differential_diagnoses: Obesity hypoventilation syndrome with neuromuscular complications
next_steps: Repetitive nerve stimulation and needle electromyography
Acetylcholine receptor antibody and voltage-gated calcium channel antibody titers
Cerebrospinal fluid analysis for protein, cytology, and paraneoplastic panel
Pulmonary function testing including maximal inspiratory and expiratory pressures
Continuation of noninvasive positive pressure ventilation and frequent respiratory monitoring
Serum creatine kinase and aldolase levels
